instruction:

input:
### Database Schema
CREATE TABLE Student (StuID NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, LName TEXT, Fname TEXT, Age NUMBER, Sex TEXT, Major NUMBER, Advisor NUMBER, city_code TEXT);
CREATE TABLE Voting_record (StuID NUMBER, Registration_Date TEXT, Election_Cycle TEXT, President_Vote NUMBER, Vice_President_Vote NUMBER, Secretary_Vote NUMBER, Treasurer_Vote NUMBER, Class_President_Vote NUMBER, Class_Senator_Vote NUMBER);
-- FK: Voting_record.Class_Senator_Vote -> Student.StuID
-- FK: Voting_record.Class_President_Vote -> Student.StuID
-- FK: Voting_record.Treasurer_Vote -> Student.StuID
-- FK: Voting_record.Secretary_Vote -> Student.StuID
-- FK: Voting_record.Vice_President_Vote -> Student.StuID
-- FK: Voting_record.President_Vote -> Student.StuID
-- FK: Voting_record.StuID -> Student.StuID

### Question
What are the first names and last names of the students who are 18 years old and have vice president votes.
output: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Fname ,  T1.LName FROM STUDENT AS T1 JOIN VOTING_RECORD AS T2 ON T1.StuID  =  T2.VICE_President_VOTE WHERE T1.age  =  18;

### Database Schema
CREATE TABLE Student (StuID NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, LName TEXT, Fname TEXT, Age NUMBER, Sex TEXT, Major NUMBER, Advisor NUMBER, city_code TEXT);
CREATE TABLE Voting_record (StuID NUMBER, Registration_Date TEXT, Election_Cycle TEXT, President_Vote NUMBER, Vice_President_Vote NUMBER, Secretary_Vote NUMBER, Treasurer_Vote NUMBER, Class_President_Vote NUMBER, Class_Senator_Vote NUMBER);

input:
### Database Schema
CREATE TABLE Student (StuID NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, LName TEXT, Fname TEXT, Age NUMBER, Sex TEXT, Major NUMBER, Advisor NUMBER, city_code TEXT);
CREATE TABLE Voting_record (StuID NUMBER, Registration_Date TEXT, Election_Cycle TEXT, President_Vote NUMBER, Vice_President_Vote NUMBER, Secretary_Vote NUMBER, Treasurer_Vote NUMBER, Class_President_Vote NUMBER, Class_Senator_Vote NUMBER);
-- FK: Voting_record.Class_Senator_Vote -> Student.StuID
-- FK: Voting_record.Class_President_Vote -> Student.StuID
-- FK: Voting_record.Treasurer_Vote -> Student.StuID
-- FK: Voting_record.Secretary_Vote -> Student.StuID
-- FK: Voting_record.Vice_President_Vote -> Student.StuID
-- FK: Voting_record.President_Vote -> Student.StuID
-- FK: Voting_record.StuID -> Student.StuID

### Question
哪个专业的学生最多？
output: SELECT Major FROM STUDENT GROUP BY major ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

CREATE TABLE Voting_record (StuID NUMBER, Registration_Date TEXT, Election_Cycle TEXT, President_Vote NUMBER, Vice_President_Vote NUMBER, Secretary_Vote NUMBER, Treasurer_Vote NUMBER, Class_President_Vote NUMBER, Class_Senator_Vote NUMBER);
-- FK: Voting_record.Class_Senator_Vote -> Student.StuID

-- FK: Voting_record.Treasurer_Vote -> Student.StuID
-- FK: Voting_record.Secretary_Vote -> Student.StuID
-- FK: Voting_record.Vice_President_Vote -> Student.StuID
-- FK: Voting_record.President_Vote -> Student.StuID
-- FK: Voting_record.StuID -> Student.StuID

### Question
找出那些有班干部选票的学生的名字。
output: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Fname FROM STUDENT AS T1 JOIN VOTING_RECORD AS T2 ON T1.StuID  =  T2.CLASS_Senator_VOTE;
